left-join.label: LEFT JOIN
left-join.summary: Include all rows from the left table and matching rows from the right.

left-join-intro.title: What is a LEFT JOIN?
left-join-intro.bodyMarkdown: A **LEFT JOIN** in SQL returns all rows from the left table, and the matched rows from the right table. If there is no match, the result is NULL from the right table. This is useful when you want to keep all records from the primary (left) table, even if there is no related data in the secondary (right) table.

left-join-syntax.title: LEFT JOIN Syntax
left-join-syntax.bodyMarkdown:
The basic syntax for a LEFT JOIN is:

```sql
SELECT columns
FROM left_table
LEFT JOIN right_table
  ON left_table.column = right_table.column;
```

Replace `columns` with the fields you want to select, and specify the tables and join condition.

left-join-example.title: Example: LEFT JOIN in Action
left-join-example.bodyMarkdown:
Suppose you have a `products` table and a `categories` table. You want to list all products, including those that do not have a category assigned:

```sql
SELECT products.name, categories.category_name
FROM products
LEFT JOIN categories ON products.category_id = categories.id;
```

This query will show all products, and for products without a category, the `category_name` will be NULL.

left-join-single-choice-1.title: What does a LEFT JOIN do?
left-join-single-choice-1.prompt: Which statement best describes the result of a LEFT JOIN?

options.a: Returns only rows that have matches in both tables.
options.b: Returns all rows from the left table and matching rows from the right table.
options.c: Returns all rows from the right table and matching rows from the left table.
options.d: Returns only unmatched rows from both tables.

left-join-multi-choice-1.title: LEFT JOIN Characteristics
left-join-multi-choice-1.prompt: Which of the following are true about LEFT JOIN? Select all that apply.

options.a: It can result in NULL values for columns from the right table.
options.b: It always returns the same number of rows as the right table.
options.c: It includes all rows from the left table.
options.d: It excludes rows from the left table if there is no match in the right table.

left-join-drag-reorder-1.title: Order the Steps for a LEFT JOIN
left-join-drag-reorder-1.prompt: Arrange the steps to perform a LEFT JOIN in the correct order.

tokens.t2: Specify the left table in the FROM clause.
tokens.t3: Add the LEFT JOIN clause with the right table.
tokens.t4: Define the ON condition for joining.

left-join-code-input-1.title: Write a LEFT JOIN Query
left-join-code-input-1.prompt: Using the `products_catalog` dataset, write a SQL query to list all products and their supplier names. Include all products, even if they do not have a supplier.
left-join-code-input-1.starterCode:
